name: backup
description: Optional local ZIP backup provider for editable source, assets, and revisions.

settings.label: Retention period
settings.description: Delete backup archives older than this many days.

settings.label: Include local revisions
settings.description: Include the private revision history directory in each backup.

settings.label: Include uploaded assets
settings.description: Include uploaded images and files referenced by documentation.

settings.label: Include application database
settings.description: Include accounts, roles, extension settings, events, and audit records.

settings.label: Include environment file
settings.description: Include the private deployment environment file in the archive.
